hypothesis: Add item_id × store_id × wday interaction target encoding (smoothed mean sales for each item-store-weekday triple). This captures the per-SKU weekly seasonality pattern directly — e.g., a specific item in a specific store might sell more on weekends vs weekdays. This is more granular than the existing item_id and store_id encodings and more direct than the DOW rolling lags, as it encodes the expected sales level for each SKU on each weekday. All other settings unchanged from exp_0012.
